papers.title_en: MedBench: Deliberative Evaluation of Medical Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究提出MedBench，一个旨在将医疗大语言模型作为“审慎代理”而非单纯预测器进行评估的新型基准。通过对8个规模在4B到32B之间的模型在6个医疗问答数据集（共19,625个问题）上的表现进行测试，该基准强调了模型在复杂医疗决策中的推理和审慎能力，为医疗AI的评估提供了更全面的视角。
papers.abstract_en: We introduce MedBench, a benchmark for evaluating medical language models asdeliberating agents rather than isolated predictors. MedBench evaluates eightmodels (4B? 32B) on 19,625 questions from six medical QA datasets using …

papers.title_en: Dual-Latent Memory Routing for Vision-Language Reasoning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态大语言模型在长文本生成过程中容易丢失早期视觉证据的问题，提出了双潜变量记忆路由（Dual-Latent Memory Routing）机制。该方法通过优化视觉信息的存储与检索路径，增强了模型在复杂视觉语言推理任务中的长期记忆能力，有效缓解了长序列生成时的性能衰减，显著提升了推理的准确性与逻辑一致性。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have recently made strong progress invision-language reasoning, yet their performance often degrades as generationsgrow longer. A key factor is that they frequently lose track of earlier visual evidence …

papers.title_en: Minibatch selection for Language Models via Partition Matroid Constrained Gradient Matching
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大规模语言模型在异构数据上训练时，难以平衡收敛速度与领域覆盖度的问题，提出了一种基于分区拟阵约束梯度匹配的小批量数据选择方法。该方法通过在满足各领域分布约束的前提下，选择与全局梯度最匹配的样本，旨在提升训练效率并确保模型在多领域任务上的泛化性能。
papers.abstract_en: Training large language models (LLMs) on heterogeneous data requires selectingminibatches that balance convergence speed with coverage across domains.Existing methods either select samples independently within each domain or rely on …

papers.title_en: Scene Graph Thinking: Reinforcing Structured Visual Reasoning for Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态大语言模型在视觉推理中忽视物体间结构化关系的问题，提出了“场景图思维”框架。该方法通过将场景图引入推理过程，强化了模型对空间和逻辑关系的感知。实验证明，该方法显著提升了模型在复杂场景下的导航和推理能力，为构建具备结构化理解能力的智能体提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated strong perceptionand reasoning capabilities. However, most existing models focus on isolated objectsand neglect structured relationships for efficient target navigation, limiting their …

papers.title_en: Towards Multimodal Large Language Models with Both Training and Inference Efficiency
papers.tldr: 针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在训练与推理效率之间难以兼得的问题，本文提出了一种兼顾两者的架构方案。传统方法如LLaVA在推理时效率较低，而交叉注意力机制则在训练上存在局限。本研究通过优化模型架构，实现了在保持高性能的同时，显著提升了训练速度并降低了推理延迟，为构建高效多模态学习系统提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) mainly fall into two architectures, eachinvolving a trade-off between training and inference efficiency: embedding spacealignment (eg LLaVA series) is inefficient during inference, while cross-attention …

papers.title_en: CofactGVR: Counterfactual Intervention for Grounded Visual Reasoning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态大模型在定位视觉推理（GVR）中存在的中间定位信号缺失及容易学习捷径的问题，提出了CofactGVR框架。该框架通过引入反事实干预机制，为模型提供更有效的学习信号，从而增强了模型在复杂推理过程中的定位准确性。实验证明，该方法能显著提升模型在GVR任务上的表现，减少对虚假相关性的依赖，为实现更可靠的视觉推理提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Despite rapid progress in Grounded Visual Reasoning (GVR) with MLLMs and RL-style fine-tuning, existing approaches often lack effective learning signals forintermediate grounding decisions and are prone to shortcut solutions. In this work …

papers.title_en: Exploiting Tree Structure for Credit Assignment in Reinforcement Learning with Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本文针对大语言模型在强化学习推理中面临的稀疏延迟奖励挑战，提出了一种利用树结构进行令牌级信用分配的方法。该研究通过结合树搜索与Actor-Critic框架，优化了长链推理过程中的反馈机制，从而显著增强了模型在复杂逻辑任务中的学习表现和推理能力。
papers.abstract_en: Reinforcement learning has shown strong promise for strengthening the reasoningability of large language models (LLMs), but sparse, delayed rewards over longchains make token-level credit assignment a central challenge. Actor–critic methods …

papers.title_en: Illusion of competence: vision–language models provide confident but inaccurate explanations in cytological diagnostics
papers.tldr: 本研究系统评估了大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）在细胞形态学诊断中的表现。研究发现，尽管这些模型在通用领域表现出色，但在处理复杂的细胞图像时存在明显的“能力幻觉”，即能够生成看似专业且自信的解释，但实际诊断准确率较低。这一结果揭示了当前视觉语言模型在医疗诊断任务中的局限性，强调了在临床应用中盲目信任模型解释的潜在风险，为未来医疗AI的优化提供了方向。
papers.abstract_en: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) have shown impressive image-understanding capabilities across domains. However, their suitability forcytomorphological diagnostics remains unclear. Here, we systematically evaluated …

papers.title_en: Organ Segmentation in CT Images Using nnU‐Net and 3D Model Generation With Marching Cubes
papers.tldr: 本研究针对CT影像中多器官手动分割耗时费力的问题，提出了一种全自动化的处理流程。该流程集成了自配置的nnU-Net深度学习框架以实现高精度的器官分割，并结合Marching Cubes算法将分割结果转化为三维模型。该方法显著提升了临床建模的效率，为医学影像分析和手术规划提供了可靠的自动化技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Multiorgan segmentation from CT scans is crucial for numerous clinical andmodeling applications, yet manual delineation remains labor‐intensive. This studyintroduces a fully automated pipeline that integrates self‐configuring nnU‐Net‐based …

papers.title_en: MedQPA-Gen: Medical Question Proposing and Answering for Report Generation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医疗影像报告生成中事实准确性不足的问题，提出了MedQPA-Gen框架。该方法通过引入医疗问题提出与回答（QPA）机制，模拟医生诊断时的思维过程，引导模型关注关键临床细节。实验证明，该方法在提升报告的事实一致性和临床质量方面具有显著优势，是迈向通用医疗AI系统的重要一步。
papers.abstract_en: Medical report generation from medical images is a vital AI task that helps doctorswith diagnosis and marks a significant step toward creating general AI-poweredmedical systems. However, previous methods either fail to optimize factual accuracy …

papers.title_en: Integrating nnU‐Net Segmentation and Clinical–Radiomics for Multicenter MRI‐Based Assessment of Soft Tissue Sarcoma Grade and Ki‐67 Expression
papers.tldr: 本研究针对软组织肉瘤（STS）活检有创且受肿瘤异质性影响的问题，开发了一种集成nnU-Net自动分割与临床影像组学的多中心MRI评估框架。通过对多中心MRI影像数据的深度挖掘，该方法实现了对STS组织学分级和Ki-67表达水平的精准预测。研究结果验证了该集成模型在术前无创风险评估中的卓越性能，为STS的临床决策和预后管理提供了可靠的数字化辅助工具。
papers.abstract_en: ABSTRACT Background Histological grade and Ki‐67 expression are prognostic riskfactors in patients with soft tissue sarcoma (STS). These assessments require biopsy,which may be affected by tumor heterogeneity and is invasive. Purpose To develop …

papers.tldr: 本研究针对生成式语言模型中嵌入矩阵随词表增大而导致参数冗余的问题，提出了 MultiHashFormer。该模型借鉴了编码器模型中的哈希技术，通过将多个 token 映射到共享的哈希向量中，极大地压缩了嵌入层的参数规模。实验表明，该方法在大幅减少参数量的同时，仍能保持与标准 Transformer 相当的生成质量，为构建轻量化、高效的大规模语言模型提供了有效的解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Language models (LMs) represent tokens using embedding matrices that scalelinearly with the vocabulary size. To constrain the parameter footprint, prior workproposes hashing many tokens into a single vector within encoder-only models …

papers.title_en: EchoSonar-R: A Multi-View Reasoning-Enabled Model for Disease Classification and Report Generation in Echocardiography
papers.tldr: 本研究针对超声心动图诊断中多切面信息整合的难点，提出了 EchoSonar-R 模型。该模型具备多视图推理能力，能够模拟临床医生从不同角度观察心脏并综合判断的过程，同时完成疾病分类与诊断报告的自动生成。通过在多视图数据上的深度融合，EchoSonar-R 显著提升了心脏疾病诊断的准确性，为超声心动图的智能化分析提供了高效且具有可解释性的解决方案。
papers.abstract_en: Echocardiography is the most widely used non-invasive cardiac imaging modality,providing essential information for cardiovascular diagnosis. Interpreting anechocardiogram requires synthesizing complementary evidence across multiple …

papers.title_en: MOPD: Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation for Capability Integration in LLM Post-Training
papers.tldr: 针对大语言模型在后训练阶段难以整合多种能力的挑战，本文提出了多教师在线策略蒸馏（MOPD）框架。该方法通过引入多个具备特定能力的教师模型，在在线强化学习过程中对学生模型进行联合引导，有效解决了传统离线微调或混合强化学习在能力融合时的冲突与效率问题，实现了模型综合性能的显著提升。
papers.abstract_en: Modern large language models (LLMs) rely on reinforcement learning during post-training to push specific capabilities, yet integrating multiple capabilities into onemodel remains hard. Existing methods, such as Off-Policy Finetune and Mix-RL, are …

papers.title_en: Discrete Diffusion Language Models for Interactive Radiology Report Drafting
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了离散扩散语言模型在放射科报告交互式起草中的应用。针对医疗领域大模型多为自回归架构的现状，研究者利用扩散模型双向去噪的特性，实现了比传统自回归模型更灵活的文本生成与编辑。实验表明，该方法在保持生成质量的同时，显著提升了报告起草的交互性，为医疗报告自动化提供了新的技术路径。
papers.abstract_en: Diffusion language models, which generate text by denoising a token canvasbidirectionally instead of emitting tokens left to right, have become competitive withautoregressive (AR) generation. Medical foundation models, however, remain almost …

papers.title_en: Embracing intra-class heterogeneity for semi-supervised medical image segmentation: From diversity to precision
papers.tldr: 针对医学图像分割中专家标注稀缺的问题，本文提出了一种关注类内异质性的半监督学习框架。研究指出医学解剖结构常表现出显著的类内差异，通过从多样性到精确性的建模，该方法旨在有效利用未标注数据。主要贡献在于提出了一种能够捕捉并利用类内异质性的新策略，从而在有限标注的情况下显著提升了医学图像分割的精度和鲁棒性。
papers.abstract_en: Due to the scarcity of expert-annotated data, Semi-Supervised Medical ImageSegmentation (SSMIS) has emerged as a promising approach. Many anatomicalstructures in medical images exhibit significant intra-class heterogeneity, with …
